theme: Light mode preferred for data clarity, but support Dark mode toggle.

rules: BANNED: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans for headings.
CRITICAL: All currency (RM 1,234.56), Part Numbers, and CPQ Numbers MUST use JetBrains Mono for vertical alignment and scanning.
Table headers and small labels must use uppercase, font-bold, and tracking-[0.2em].
Use Tinted Greys. Never use pure #000000 or #808080.
BANNED: Teal Green or Teal Blue (#1B93A4) - strictly forbidden for this dashboard.
Color is function. 95% of the UI should be monochrome. Use the brand accent only to guide action (primary buttons, active tabs).

surface_strategies: Grid Borders (The Technical Look): Use visible grid lines for the data-heavy sections. border-collapse on tables with subtle right/bottom borders.
Flat Solid Surfaces: Do not use soft fuzzy drop shadows on cards. Use 1px solid border (border-border). For hover states, use a crisp translation (-translate-y-px) and a sharper shadow (shadow-sm).

layouts.login: Split Screen. Left: Abstract geometric visual (use provided media URL). Right: Clean login form aligned to the center. Generous padding (p-12 to p-24).
layouts.search_home: Centered layout (max-w-7xl). The Search Bar is the Hero - make it massive (text-2xl) and centered at the top. Below it, a sleek, dense data table.
layouts.part_detail: Bento Grid approach. Top section: Current Unit Price (massive text) and Part Meta info. Bottom section: Full width chronological table of CPQ history. Optional: a Recharts line chart showing price trend over time.
layouts.add_edit_form: Shadcn Form. Implement a dynamic list (add multiple line items) under a single CPQ input. Use a card-like layout for each line item.
layouts.excel_import: Large drag-and-drop zone with a dashed border. Upon parsing, render a simplified preview table to confirm mappings before final import.
layouts.spacing: External container spacing must be generous (p-8 to p-12). Internal tabular data spacing must be dense (py-2 px-3).

components.tables: Shadcn UI Table. Implement sticky headers. Row hover state (hover:bg-slate-50). Text left-aligned for data, right-aligned for numbers/currency.
components.forms: Shadcn UI Form, Input, Select. Never use native raw inputs.
components.buttons: Crisp geometry (rounded-md). Always explicitly set hover states (hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
components.dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog for the Edit Price form or mapping preview if it doesn't fit inline.

rules: Micro-interactions: Buttons should have a slight scale/transform on active/hover.
Layout animations: Expanding table rows or adding new line items must animate smoothly (framer-motion).
No universal transitions. Apply strictly to target properties.

login_background.usage: Use as a full-height image on the left side of the Login screen.

rules: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Announce sorting and filtering changes via screen-reader live regions.
Focus states must be highly visible (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2).

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The codebase uses .js and .jsx files, not .tsx. Do not use TypeScript interfaces or types.
All currency must be strictly formatted as 'RM 1,234.56'.
Implement Sonner (`/app/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx` or similar path) for all toast notifications (Login, Import, Save).
DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for the sticky header or overlapping dropdowns. Use solid bg or backdrop-blur.
The Part Detail comparison view is the core value proposition: make the distinction between the current list price and the CPQ historical price aggressively clear.
Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` to the CSS.
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like robot, brain, lightbulb, target etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable outside of the tables.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
